description: Animates one numeric entity property (x, y, scaleX/scaleY/scale, rotation, opacity) from a start value to a target over a duration with an easing curve (linear, in/out/in-out-quad, out-back overshoot). Auto-starts; loop modes none (hold at target) / loop / pingpong (triangle wave). The data path to juice motions: coin pops, bobbing pickups, fade-ins, slide-ins, pulsing beacons. from defaults to the property's current value. Visual/positional only; collision uses the base AABB. Pure per-tick math (deterministic). State is namespaced per property, so independent tweens of x and opacity coexist.

from.description: Start value (whitelisted; default = the property's current value when the tween starts).
